3.sql: SELECT omrade FROM stormflohavniva_03618ac2d6ba4ba0ae13e7ead6caf572.stormflo200ar_klimaarna storm WHERE ST_Intersects(storm.omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'));

1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and geometry (and bbox) for spatial prefiltering

2.description: get buildings (id, geometry) in the municipality using kommunenummer from step 1

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons intersecting municipality bbox from step 1

4.description: union storm-flood polygons into a single geometry to avoid duplicate building matches

5.description: find buildings that intersect the unioned 200-year storm-flood area

6.description: count distinct buildings intersecting the storm-flood area

replan_trigger.error: Step 4 is planned as 'union', but was attempted as 'spatial_join'. Produce a new plan or execute the planned action.
